sentences.target: Le tuyau du lavabo fuit encore.

translations.fr: Le tuyau du lavabo fuit encore.
translations.en: The sink pipe is leaking again.
translations.es: La tubería del lavabo vuelve a gotear.
translations.it: Il tubo del lavandino perde ancora.
translations.zh-Hans: 洗手池的管子又漏水了。
translations.pt: O cano da pia está vazando de novo.
translations.vi: Ống nước của bồn rửa lại bị rò rỉ.
translations.ar: أنبوب الحوض يسرب الماء مرة أخرى.
translations.hi: सिंक का पाइप फिर से लीक हो रहा है.
translations.el: Ο σωλήνας του νιπτήρα στάζει πάλι.
translations.ro: Țeava de la chiuvetă curge din nou.
translations.ja: 洗面台の配管がまた漏れています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'tuyau' as a specific item.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject NP.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le' to form 'du'; introduces the complement 'lavabo' (genitive/of-phrase).
Common noun, masculine; complement of the preposition 'du' specifying which sink.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate describing the subject's action/state (to leak).
Adverb; modifies the verb 'fuit' to indicate continuity.

translations.en: We’re rolling up the garden hose.
translations.es: Estamos enrollando la manguera del jardín.
translations.it: Stiamo arrotolando il tubo da giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在把花园水管卷起来。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度將花園水喉捲起。
translations.pt: Estamos enrolando a mangueira do jardim.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cuộn ống tưới vườn.
translations.hi: हम बगीचे की नली लपेट रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 庭のホースを巻いています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular agreement on the verb.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate meaning to wind/roll up.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun 'tuyau'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'enroule'.
Elided preposition 'de' before a vowel; introduces the noun complement 'arrosage' forming a compound ('tuyau d'arrosage').
Common noun, masculine; noun complement specifying the type of hose.

sentences.target: Tu peux déboucher ce tuyau, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø debuʃe sə tɥjo, sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux déboucher ce tuyau, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø debuʃe sə tɥjo, sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you unclog this pipe, please?
translations.de: Kannst du dieses Rohr bitte entstopfen?
translations.it: Puoi sturare questo tubo, per favore?
translations.zh-Hans: 你能把这根管子疏通一下吗？
translations.yue: 可唔可以幫我通一通呢條喉？
translations.pt: Você pode desentupir este cano, por favor?
translations.he: אתה יכול לפתוח את הסתימה בצינור הזה בבקשה?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể thông ống này giúp tôi không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك تسليك هذا الأنبوب من فضلك؟
translations.nl: Kun je deze pijp alsjeblieft ontstoppen?
translations.uk: Можеш, будь ласка, прочистити цю трубу?
translations.hi: क्या आप कृपया इस पाइप का जाम खोल सकते हैं?
translations.pl: Czy możesz udrożnić tę rurę, proszę?
translations.el: Μπορείς να ξεβουλώσεις αυτόν τον σωλήνα, σε παρακαλώ?
translations.nb: Kan du stake opp dette røret, vær så snill?
translations.sv: Kan du rensa det här röret, tack?
translations.ro: Poți, te rog, să desfundi țeava asta?
translations.da: Kan du fjerne tilstopningen i dette rør, tak?
translations.fi: Voitko avata tämän putken tukoksen, kiitos?
translations.ja: このパイプの詰まりを直してくれますか？

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; addresses the interlocutor.
Verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; modal expressing ability/permission.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux' indicating the action.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; specifies the noun 'tuyau'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'déboucher'.
Elided subordinating conjunction 'si' before 'il'; part of the polite formula 's'il te plaît'.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; in the fixed expression 's'il te plaît' ('please').
2nd person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object); complements 'plaît' in the polite expression.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the subordinate clause in the fixed polite request.

sentences.target: Je raccorde un tuyau à la pompe.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁakɔʁd œ̃ tɥjo a la pɔ̃p/

translations.fr: Je raccorde un tuyau à la pompe.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁakɔʁd œ̃ tɥjo a la pɔ̃p/
translations.en: I’m connecting a pipe to the pump.
translations.es: Estoy conectando un tubo a la bomba.
translations.de: Ich schließe ein Rohr an die Pumpe an.
translations.it: Sto collegando un tubo alla pompa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把一根管子接到水泵上。
translations.yue: 我而家將條喉駁到水泵上。
translations.pt: Estou conectando um tubo à bomba.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nối một ống vào máy bơm.
translations.nl: Ik sluit een pijp aan op de pomp.
translations.hi: मैं पंप से एक पाइप जोड़ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg kobler et rør til pumpen.
translations.id: Saya sedang menyambungkan pipa ke pompa.
translations.sv: Jag kopplar ett rör till pumpen.
translations.da: Jeg tilslutter et rør til pumpen.
translations.ja: ポンプにパイプを接続しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate meaning to connect/attach.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'tuyau' as a non-specific item.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'raccorde'.
Preposition; introduces the indirect complement indicating the attachment target.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'pompe'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'à', target of the connection.

We’re rolling up the garden hose.
Can you unclog this pipe, please?
I’m connecting a pipe to the pump.
